# clientsecret-dollar-ref

oidc.config clientSecret $ref must become a SecretKeySelector, not a literal

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/oidc/clientsecret-dollar-ref` |
| CR name | `argocd-config` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  oidc.config: |
    name: Example
    issuer: https://issuer.example.com
    clientID: argocd
    clientSecret: $oidc.clientSecret
    requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    oidc:
      clientID: argocd
      clientSecretRef:
        key: oidc.clientSecret
        name: argocd-secret
      issuerURL: https://issuer.example.com
      name: Example
      requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  oidc.config: |
    clientID: argocd
    clientSecret: $oidc.clientSecret
    issuer: https://issuer.example.com
    name: Example
    requestedScopes:
    - openid
    - profile
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
